description: CompositionBlack PES material calf-length single jersey, with hemispherical cut side panel and broad waist bandFittingSlimWash careHand wash or machine washDesigned to concentrate every bit of your energy to generate maximum speed, power and endurance during exercise regimes, these calf-length tights from adidas have power bands that reinforce key muscle groups and help improve overall performance and posture. The broad waist band holds the tights firm in place while the three strips along the side length add a subtle glam look. Model statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2.
